description: Discover the ultimate in power, capability, and refined luxury with this stunning 2026 GMC Sierra 1500 Denali Ultimate. Boasting a bold and commanding presence, this exceptional vehicle is ready to elevate your driving experience to new heights.  THIS VEHICLE ALSO INCLUDES THE FOLLOWING OPTIONS AND FEATURES:  Apple CarPlay  Android Auto   Downpour Metallic Blue Exterior  CARBON FIBER COMPOSITE BED  Prepare to be captivated by the Sierra 1500 Denali Ultimate's unparalleled performance. Equipped with the mighty EcoTec3 6.2L V8 engine and a smooth-shifting 10-Speed Automatic transmission, this truck delivers an exhilarating driving dynamic. With its 4WD capability, you'll conquer any terrain with confidence, whether navigating city streets or tackling off-road adventures.  The Sierra 1500 Denali Ultimate's striking exterior is a true head-turner. The bold, distinctive Denali grille and 22-inch ultra-bright machined alloy wheels command attention, while the Downpour Metallic Blue paint and carbon fiber composite bed add a premium, sophisticated touch. Step inside and you'll be enveloped in the ultimate in luxury, with a cabin that's meticulously crafted with premium materials and thoughtful details.  Indulge in the ultimate in comfort and convenience with the Sierra 1500 Denali Ultimate's extensive list of features. Enjoy the convenience of keyless entry, push-button start, and a 360-degree camera system. Stay connected with the intuitive infotainment system, complete with Apple CarPlay and Android Auto integration. Relax in the heated and ventilated front seats, while the heated rear seats ensure your passengers are equally pampered.  Safety is also a top priority, with advanced driver-assistance technologies like forward collision alert, automatic emergency braking, and lane-keeping assist. The Sierra 1500 Denali Ultimate is designed to keep you and your loved ones protected on the road.  Experience the unparalleled blend of power, capability, and refined luxury that the 2026 GMC Sierra 1500 Denali Ultimate offers. This exceptional vehicle is ready to elevate your driving experience and exceed your expectations. Visit our showroom today to take this remarkable truck for a test drive and discover why it's the ultimate choice for the discerning buyer.  * All vehicles are one of each and are subject to prior sale. Hands-on steering assist and lane centering ease long drives by helping keep the Terrain positioned in its lane while you remain engaged, reducing fatigue and making highway stretches feel more relaxed.  Forward collision mitigation continuously monitors traffic ahead and readies the vehicle when a sudden slowdown is detected, helping reduce the chance or severity of a frontal impact.  Front pedestrian impact prevention enhances urban safety by watching for pedestrians ahead and taking steps to avoid or lessen collisions when a conflict becomes likely.  Mobile hotspot turns the Terrain into a rolling WiFi hub so passengers can stay connected without draining individual data plans, handy for road trips and busy family schedules.  The rear camera provides a clearer view behind the vehicle to simplify parking and backing maneuvers, revealing obstacles you might not otherwise see.  Lane departure prevention helps correct unintended drifting and keeps you between the lines, adding an extra layer of protection against lane-departure incidents.  Active blind spot system watches the vehicles sides and rear, alerting you to hidden traffic and intervening to help prevent unsafe lane changes so you can merge with greater confidence.  Rear collision mitigation monitors the area behind you and prepares vehicle systems if a rear impact is likely, aiming to lessen damage and protect occupants.  The 2026 GMC Terrain Elevation pairs turbocharged efficiency with a suite of driver-assist and connectivity features that suit daily driving and longer journeys alike. All vehicles are subject to prior sale.Introducing the 2026 BMW X7 xDrive40i, a luxurious and performance-driven SUV that embodies the pinnacle of BMW's engineering and design prowess. This particular model, available at Auto Collection Murfreesboro, is a testament to sophistication and innovation, offering an unparalleled driving experience. With only 5,500 miles on the odometer, this vehicle is practically brand new and ready to deliver years of driving pleasure.**Performance and Efficiency:**Under the hood, the X7 xDrive40i is powered by a robust 3.0L Mild Hybrid Turbo I6 engine, producing an impressive 375 horsepower and 398 lb-ft of torque. This powertrain is paired with an 8-speed sport automatic transmission, ensuring smooth and responsive shifts. The all-wheel-drive system provides exceptional traction and stability, making it perfect for any road condition. Despite its power, the X7 maintains impressive fuel efficiency, achieving 21 MPG in the city and 25 MPG on the highway.**Exterior and Interior Design:**The exterior of this X7 is finished in a stunning Skyscraper Grey Metallic paint, which exudes elegance and modernity. Complementing the exterior is the M Sport Package, which includes 22" M V-Spoke Jet Black Wheels (Style 755M), enhancing the vehicle's sporty and aggressive stance. Inside, the cabin is adorned with Cognac Sensafin upholstery, offering a warm and inviting atmosphere. The Fineline Stripe Brown High-Gloss Wood Trim adds a touch of sophistication to the interior.**Luxury and Technology Features:**This X7 is equipped with the Executive Package, which includes a host of premium features designed to enhance comfort and convenience. The Climate Comfort Package ensures that all passengers enjoy a pleasant cabin environment, with heated front seats, armrests, and steering wheel. Ambient lighting sets the mood, while the second-row captain's chairs provide additional comfort and space.The vehicle is loaded with cutting-edge technology, including Apple CarPlay and Android Auto for seamless smartphone integration. description: For Sale: 2026 Mercedes-AMG G63  Copper Orange Magno  Dark Gray/Brown Interior  Fully Loaded  Level B4 Armored A commanding fusion of luxury, performance, and discreet protection  this 2026 Mercedes-AMG G63 is finished in the ultra-rare Copper Orange Magno over a Dark Gray/Brown leather interior with elegant woodgrain trim. Fully optioned from the factory and professionally up-armored, this G63 delivers unmistakable presence with lightweight executive security engineered for real-world use. Power comes from AMGs legendary 4.0-liter twin-turbocharged V8, delivering signature G63 performance through its advanced all-wheel-drive system. Thanks to the optimized armoring design, the vehicles power, sound, handling, and drivability remain fully intact. This example has been professionally armored to Level B4 ballistic standards by our partners at Armoris Defense, with the entire armor package coming in under 500 pounds of total added weight. Protection is strategically integrated into the ballistic glass, doors, and structural pillars, providing effective defense against handgun threats while maintaining OEM ride quality, braking, and suspension geometry. The installation is fully discreet, preserving factory aesthetics inside and out. This vehicle is not equipped with run-flat tires, prioritizing factory ride comfort, handling characteristics, and reduced unsprung weight. This setup maintains the true AMG driving experience while allowing the next owner flexibility in tire selection based on personal preference or usage. Inside, the cabin blends authority with refinement  premium leather upholstery in dark gray and brown tones, rich woodgrain accents, and the latest AMG technology and driver-assistance features create an environment equally suited for daily driving, executive transport, or low-profile security needs. Highlights: 2026 Mercedes-AMG G63 Factory Copper Orange Magno exterior Dark Gray / Brown leather interior with woodgrain trim Fully loaded factory specification Level B4 ballistic armoring by Armoris Defense Under 500 lb total added armor weight Ballistic glass, doors, and pillar protection No run-flat tires (factory ride quality preserved) 4.0L Twin-Turbo V8 AMG powertrain All-Wheel Drive with AMG performance tuning Discreet, OEM-preserved executive-protection appearance Nationwide shipping  financing available This G63 represents a rare balance of AMG performance, lightweight armor, and factory-level luxury  a turnkey solution for executives, public figures, and buyers who value protection without compromise. No matter the weather, find comfort in heated driver and front passenger seat cushions.Convenience Cruise control with steering wheel mounted controls. Set it and forget it. This can help minimize driver fatigue and improve overall fuel economy. Resting your right foot is right at your fingertips thanks to cruise control with steering wheel mounted controls.Safety and Security Rear camera - Watching your back! Brake assist - Stop right there.  Something jumps out into the middle of the road and you need to stop now!  With brake assist, you will.  It uses the speed of the brake pedal's travel to sense panic braking, then applies all available power to boost your stopping power. description: The 2013 Toyota RAV4 XLE is a standout option for those seeking a reliable and versatile compact SUV. This model is equipped with a robust 2.5L I-4 DOHC engine that delivers 176 horsepower, paired with a smooth 6-speed automatic transmission. With its remarkable fuel efficiency and ample power, the RAV4 XLE is perfect for daily commutes and weekend adventures alike.One of the top features of the RAV4 XLE is its rear camera. This feature enhances safety by providing a clear view of obstacles and hazards behind the vehicle, making reversing and parking much easier. The added visibility ensures peace of mind when navigating tight spaces or busy parking lots.Additionally, the RAV4 XLE is equipped with brake assist technology, which detects panic braking and applies maximum stopping power when needed. This feature can be crucial in emergency situations, helping to prevent accidents before they happen.Long drives become a breeze with the cruise control feature that comes with steering wheel-mounted controls. This allows drivers to maintain a steady speed without constant acceleration, reducing fatigue during long trips and optimizing fuel economy.For those who appreciate a breath of fresh air, the first-row power express open/close sunroof is an inviting feature. With just a touch of a button, you can enjoy the sunshine or gaze at the stars while still seated comfortably inside the cabin.Comfort is also prioritized with dual-zone front HVAC controls, allowing the driver and front passenger to set their individual temperature preferences. This ensures everyone can enjoy a pleasant ride, regardless of personal comfort needs.Moreover, the RAV4 XLE boasts wireless audio streaming capabilities, allowing you to enjoy your favorite music and podcasts directly from your mobile device without the hassle of cords. This feature enhances the overall driving experience by keeping you connected and entertained on the road.The ignition immobilizer system adds an extra layer of security to the RAV4 XLE, making it more difficult for thieves to start the vehicle. This passive security feature ensures that your vehicle remains protected when parked.In conclusion, the 2013 Toyota RAV4 XLE combines practicality, safety, and comfort into a well-rounded package. With its powerful engine, innovative features, and spacious interior, this SUV is an excellent choice for anyone in the market for a reliable vehicle. Whether youre commuting to work or embarking on a road trip, the RAV4 XLE is equipped to handle it all with ease.Discover unbeatable deals and premium service at *Culver City Honda*, conveniently located near *Los Angeles,* *Santa Monica*, *Marina Del Ray* and *Beverly Hills*. Quick Order Package 23S High Altitude  Advanced Technology Group  Navigation System  Advanced Brake Assist  Body Color Fascia w/Trivalent Rings  Trivalent Fascia Applique  Blind Spot & Cross Path Detection  Black Headlamp Bezels  Headlamp Washer  High intensity discharge headlights: Bi-Xenon  Adaptive Cruise Control w/Stop  Black Roof Molding  Body Color Door Handles  Body Color Exterior Mirrors  Body Color Sill Extension  Dual Dark Chrome Exhaust Tip  Jeep Black Gloss Badging  Rear Fascia Gloss Black Step Pad  Taillamp Bezels w/Trivalent Finish  Trivalent Finish Fog Lamp Bezels  Black Accent Stitching  Bright Pedals  Forward Collision Warning Plus  Leather Trim Seats w/Edge Welting (HA)  Leather Wrapped Steering Wheel  Parksense Front & Rear Park Assist System  Silver Anodized Interior Accents  Wheels: 20" x 8.0" Aluminum w/Black Finish  This 2015 Jeep Grand Cherokee Overland is a true standout in its class. With its powerful 3.6L V6 engine, smooth 8-speed automatic transmission, and rear-wheel drive configuration, this Jeep delivers an exceptional blend of capability and efficiency. The exterior boasts a sleek, sophisticated White paint finish, complemented by a host of premium styling cues like Bi-Xenon headlights, body-color mirrors and door handles, and a bold black roof molding. This 2017 Ram 1500 Laramie is a true standout in its class, offering the perfect blend of power, technology, and sophistication. Ventilated front seats provides targeted cool air so you and your passenger can get comfortable quicker in hot weather. Getting comfortable is no sweat when you have ventilated front seats. Heated driver and front passenger seat cushions - That's hot. Heated driver and front passenger seat cushions provide more targeted warmth so you can get comfortable quicker in cold weather. If you have lower body pain, you might also be soothed by the heat while you drive. No matter the weather, find comfort in heated driver and front passenger seat cushions.Convenience Cruise control with steering wheel mounted controls. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful, until cruise control set the pace. Simply set the desired speed using the steering wheel mounted controls and it will maintain that speed without driver intervention. This can help minimize driver fatigue and improve overall fuel economy. Resting your right foot is right at your fingertips thanks to cruise control with steering wheel mounted controls.Safety and Security Rear camera - Watching your back!  The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe. Brake assist - Stop right there.  Something jumps out into the middle of the road and you need to stop now!  With brake assist, you will.  It uses the speed of the brake pedal's travel to sense panic braking, then applies all available power to boost your stopping power. Brake assist can stop the accident before it is one.Technology and Telematics Selective Internet access - a more focused delivery. Selective internet access allows you to tailor the features for your feed, such as sports scores, local news, or current weather. When it comes to getting what you want, selective internet access is a net gain. Voice activated integrated navigation system - A to B made easy! Whether it's an errand or a road trip, the voice activated integrated navigation system will guide you to your destination.  No more bulky, impossible-to-fold maps, and no more stopping to ask for directions. Just tell it where you want to go, and the voice activated integrated navigation system shows you the right way. description: Introducing the 2019 BMW X3 sDrive30i, a compact luxury SUV that effortlessly combines performance, comfort, and cutting-edge technology. With its striking Silver exterior and refined Black interior, this vehicle not only exudes sophistication but also embodies the spirit of the ultimate driving machine. With just below 57,000 miles on the odometer, averaging less than 9,000 miles per year, this X3 is in excellent overall condition and promises to deliver a driving experience that remains exhilarating yet practical.  At the heart of the 2019 BMW X3 sDrive30i is a robust 2.0L Turbocharged Inline-4 engine, generating an impressive 248 horsepower and 258 lb-ft of torque. This engine is engineered for both spirited performance and commendable efficiency, allowing the X3 to accelerate from 0 to 60 mph in approximately 6 seconds. Coupled with an 8-speed automatic transmission, the driving dynamics are enhanced further, offering smooth shifts and responsive handling. Whether you are navigating city streets or cruising along the highway, the X3 delivers a confident performance, achieving an EPA-estimated 23 MPG in the city and 30 MPG on the highway.  The exterior design of the 2019 BMW X3 reflects the brands commitment to elegance and athleticism. The Silver finish not only gives the vehicle a polished and modern look but also enhances its aerodynamic profile. The signature BMW kidney grille, flanked by sleek LED headlights, adds an aggressive touch to the front fascia. The vehicle's sculpted lines and well-defined contours create a sense of motion even when the X3 is at rest. 18-inch alloy wheels complement the overall aesthetic, providing a perfect blend of style and functionality.  Step inside the cabin, and youll be greeted by a sophisticated Black interior that is both luxurious and functional. High-quality materials are used throughout, including premium leather upholstery, soft-touch surfaces, and meticulously crafted accents. The spacious interior offers ample headroom and legroom for both front and rear passengers, ensuring comfort on long journeys or daily commutes. The rear seats can be folded down to expand the cargo area, providing versatility for transporting larger items.  The 2019 BMW X3 is equipped with a host of factory-default features designed to enhance both comfort and convenience. The iDrive infotainment system, displayed on a high-resolution 8.8-inch touchscreen, serves as the command center for navigation, media, and vehicle settings. Bluetooth connectivity and a premium audio system allow for seamless integration of your devices, ensuring that you stay connected while on the go. Additionally, Apple CarPlay and Android Auto compatibility enable effortless smartphone integration for navigation and music streaming.  Safety is paramount in the BMW X3, with a suite of advanced safety features designed to provide peace of mind for drivers and passengers alike. Standard features include a rearview camera, parking sensors, and a suite of driver assistance technologies such as forward collision warning, automatic emergency braking, and blind-spot monitoring. The structural integrity of the X3, combined with its advanced airbag system, provides an added layer of safety in the event of a collision.  With a clean CARFAX report, this 2019 BMW X3 sDrive30i stands out not only for its performance and features but also for its impeccable history. This vehicle has been well-maintained, ensuring that it meets the high standards expected of a BMW. Whether you're seeking a reliable daily driver or a luxurious vehicle for weekend adventures, the X3 is equipped to handle both with ease.  In summary, the 2019 BMW X3 sDrive30i is a perfect blend of performance, luxury, and practicality. With its efficient turbocharged engine, advanced technology, and a commitment to safety, this vehicle is designed to elevate your driving experience. Don't miss the opportunity to own this exceptional SUV that offers both style and substance. Safety is also a top priority in the 2018 Jeep Cherokee Latitude, with features like dual front impact airbags, dual front side impact airbags, and Electronic Stability Control to help keep you and your passengers secure. description: Why BUY from Sterling Acura of Austin?     When you choose this Black Sapphire Metallic 2019 BMW 3 Series 330i with 102,364 miles, you are not just buying a used vehicle - you are investing in quality, reliability and peace of mind. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life.  When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident.  Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead. Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety.  Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision. Rear camera - Watching your back!  The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.Technology and Telematics Apple CarPlay smart device wireless mirroring Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. description: Unleash a higher standard of driving with this Clean CARFAX 2019 Acura RDX A-Spec. Dressed in a crisp White finish and featuring the aggressive A-Spec Package, this SUV is engineered for those who crave "grit" on the road and luxury in the cabin. Sitting on 20-inch Shark Gray Split 5-Spoke Wheels and powered by a high-output 2.0L Turbocharged engine, the RDX delivers an exhilarating 272 horsepower through a lightning-fast 10-speed automatic transmission. With an odometer reading 15,530 miles below market average, this award-winning crossover offers a like-new performance profile that truly stands out from the crowd.  Step into a cockpit designed for the driving enthusiast. The Premium Ultrasuede-Trimmed Interior features Heated and Ventilated Front Sport Seats with bold contrast stitching, providing lateral support during spirited drives and total comfort on long commutes. The massive Panoramic Moonroof floods the cabin with light, while the Acura Navigation System with 3D View and Apple CarPlay keep you connected to the world around you. Audiophiles will be captivated by the ELS Studio 3D Premium Audio System, a 16-speaker masterpiece that creates a concert-hall experience on every trip.  Versatility meets high-tech convenience in this redesigned RDX. The Power Liftgate opens to reveal a class-leading cargo area with under-floor storage, perfect for keeping valuables secure. Whether youre utilizing the Memory Settings for your perfect driving position or taking advantage of the Integrated Dynamics System (IDS) to dial in your preferred steering and throttle response, the RDX adapts to your lifestyle. With the Remote Keyless Entry and HomeLink Garage Door Transmitter, your daily transitions are seamless and sophisticated.  Safety is a cornerstone of the Acura brand, and this RDX is equipped with the comprehensive AcuraWatch suite. Drive with absolute confidence thanks to the Lane Keeping Assist System (LKAS), Collision Mitigation Braking, and Adaptive Cruise Control. The Exterior Parking Camera and Auto High-beam Headlights act as your vigilant co-pilot, while the Blind Spot Information System ensures youre always aware of your surroundings on the busy Austin highways. If you are looking for a low-mileage, meticulously maintained sport SUV that refuses to compromise on style or safety, this RDX A-Spec is the definitive choice. description: Discover the exhilarating 2024 Ford Mustang GT Premium, a true automotive icon that blends power, style, and advanced technology. With its striking Vapor Blue Metallic exterior and a commanding 5.0L V8 engine under the hood, this Mustang is ready to take your driving experience to new heights.   10-Speed Automatic Transmission with SelectShift, Paddle Shifters, and Remote Start System  Vapor Blue Metallic Exterior  Blue Interior  The Mustang GT Premium offers an unparalleled combination of performance and refinement. The 10-speed automatic transmission delivers seamless, lightning-fast gear changes, while the 3.15 Limited Slip Rear Axle Ratio provides exceptional traction and control. Indulge in the convenience of the Remote Start System, allowing you to warm up the engine and cabin before even stepping inside.  Elevate your driving experience with the Mustang's premium features. The Security Package ensures your peace of mind, while the 9-speaker audio system with SiriusXM and HD Radio provides a captivating soundtrack to your journeys. Stay connected with the advanced SYNC 4.0 infotainment system, and enjoy the comfort of the climate-controlled, heated, and ventilated front seats.  Discover the thrill of the open road in the 2024 Ford Mustang GT Premium. With its impressive fuel economy, reaching up to 23 MPG on the highway, and a powerful 5.0L V8 engine, this Mustang offers the perfect balance of performance and efficiency. Experience the exhilaration of rear-wheel drive and the confidence of the four-wheel independent suspension, delivering a dynamic and responsive driving experience.  Indulge in the luxurious interior, featuring premium leather upholstery, a heated steering wheel, and a power-operated convertible roof. The Mustang's sleek and aggressive exterior design turns heads wherever you go, while the Rear Parking Sensors and Exterior Parking Camera Rear provide added convenience and peace of mind.  Whether you're seeking the thrill of open-road adventures or the sophistication of a premium sports car, the 2024 Ford Mustang GT Premium is the perfect choice. Visit our showroom today and discover the true essence of American muscle, refined for the modern driver.  **All pricing is plus tax, title, and documentation fee of $999. Price does not include dealer added accessories! You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life.  When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident.  Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead. Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety.  Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision. Rear camera - Watching your back!  The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe. Predictive brake assist - Be prepared for your big brake. Predictive brake assist monitors the available distance in front of you compared to your vehicles speed.  If your speed exceeds the required distance to stop short of a collision, it readies your brakes to apply maximum stopping force when you use them. description: Available now at Keating Chevrolet, this 2024 Chevrolet Tahoe Z71 4WD arrives in a commanding Black exterior paired with a refined Jet Black interior, delivering rugged capability, premium comfort, and advanced technology throughout.  Powered by the proven 5.3L EcoTec3 V8 paired with a 10-speed automatic transmission, the Z71 package enhances off-road confidence with a 2-speed transfer case, Mechanical Limited-Slip Differential, front skid plate, Hill Descent Control, StabiliTrak, all-terrain tires, and 20-inch machined aluminum wheels with Technical Gray pockets. Trailer-ready design includes integrated trailering equipment and Electronic Precision Shift for smooth, confident operation.  Inside, the Tahoe Z71 offers tri-zone automatic climate control, heated front leather bucket seats, wireless device charging, keyless open/start, remote start, 120-volt outlets, and a spacious cabin designed for comfort and convenience. The Chevrolet Infotainment 3 Premium system features a 10.2-inch HD touchscreen, Google built-in capability, Bluetooth audio streaming, personalized profiles, and wireless Apple CarPlay/Android Auto.  The added Luxury Package brings premium upgrades including Memory Settings, power-release 2nd-row 60/40 bench, power-folding 3rd row, heated 2nd-row outboard seats, heated power-folding mirrors, a heated steering wheel, power tilt/telescopic steering column, Rear Pedestrian Alert, and HD Surround Vision for enhanced visibility. This Tahoe is also equipped with 2nd-row power bucket seats, all-weather floor liners, and a power panoramic sunroof with power sunshade.  Safety is strengthened with Chevy Safety Assist, offering Automatic Emergency Braking, Forward Collision Alert, Lane Keep Assist with Lane Departure Warning, Front Pedestrian Braking, Following Distance Indicator, and IntelliBeam automatic high beams. Additional Driver Alert features include Rear Cross Traffic Alert and Lane Change Alert with Side Blind Zone Alert, plus Front and Rear Park Assist and an advanced theft-deterrent system.  Bold, capable, luxurious, and designed for family versatility, this 2024 Tahoe Z71 4WD delivers the ideal balance of performance and premium refinement.  This vehicle is available now at Keating Chevrolet. For more details, visit www.keatingchevrolet.com  or call 936-286-4495.  Certified. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life.  When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident.  Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead. Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety.  Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision. Hands-off cruise control - Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful. Cruise control only managed speed, but not distance or safety. Now with hands-off cruise control simply set your desired speed and let sensor technology maintain a safe distance between you and surrounding vehicles with minimal steering input from you. It slows you down; speeds you up and even keeps you in your own lane. Meet your ultimate co-pilot with hands-off cruise control.
